title: Triad Closeout Boring After Post Tool Capacity V1
summary: Harden the worker-to-reviewer-to-promotion closeout seam after post_tool_capacity so the next triad mission needs less manual rescue.

charter.objective: Reduce the manual execution-lane rescue still needed after real worker progress and post_tool_capacity_exhausted so the triad closeout path becomes more boring, explicit, and reviewer-gated.
charter.primaryMetric: A bounded mission launched from `missionCell: triad-closeout-boring-after-post-tool-capacity-v1` carries further through worker closeout, reviewer verdict, and promotion than DAV-166 did without equivalent manual lane rescue.
guardMetrics: No provider or orchestration platform expansion.
No bypass of explicit reviewer truth.
charter.budget: One bounded branch-sized hardening mission with midpoint commits allowed and one honest rerun if the seam changes materially.
charter.runtime: A single closeout hardening container focused on the path after worker progress and post_tool_capacity_exhausted.
allowedZones: targeted tests and bounded live proof
minimal operator/runbook truth if the closeout path actually changes
forbiddenZones: general autonomy platform work beyond the closeout seam

type2Autonomy: bounded closeout-seam edits inside the stated blast radius
targeted worker/reviewer/promotion hardening that stays reversible
one narrow rerun to prove the closeout seam improved
type1Escalations: main branch mutation outside reviewed merge flow
strategy changes that turn the mission into a new platform program
escalationPath: stop at the boundary instead of guessing
state the exact action and why it is Type-1
escalate to David with the narrowest truthful packet

oberreviewerTriggers: the mission starts solving generic autonomy instead of the closeout seam
reviewer truth is being skipped because the worker branch already exists
promotion is claimed without a materially less manual closeout path
requiredEvidence: targeted runtime or test proof on the closeout path
the smallest truthful before/after statement about manual rescue reduction
stopReasons: remaining work has widened into a new program

replayChecks: the worker closeout path after post_tool_capacity is more explicit than before
the reviewer verdict still remains explicit and path-changing
the next bounded triad mission would require less manual agent-key/run rescue
guardChecks: the mission stays on the closeout seam
no forbidden editor-internal truth surfaces are used
successSignals: one bounded rerun closes out with less manual intervention than DAV-166
reviewer verdict remains first-class runtime truth
promotion depends less on execution-lane rescue than before

defaultTargets: the minimal runtime seam that now carries the closeout truth durably
promoteWhen: the next closeout path needs materially less manual rescue
the reviewer verdict remains explicit and reviewable
the proof is readable from runtime truth and repo truth without hidden archaeology
stayExperimentalWhen: the gain only worked because of one-off manual rescue
the result still depends on forbidden side surfaces
the same closeout seam remains equally manual
demoteWhen: the mission hides continued manual rescue behind nicer wording
the reviewer lane becomes more decorative than operative
promotion would imply boring autonomy before it exists

firmBound: explicit reviewer-gated closeout after worker progress
manual rescue reduction as the core success truth
the rule that triad closeout must become more boring over time
carrierBound: current Paperclip runtime and quota behavior
current worker-pr / worker-done / reviewer-verdict API surfaces

starterPath.trigger: Start a second bounded triad mission after DAV-165/DAV-166 and focus explicitly on the closeout seam after worker progress and post_tool_capacity_exhausted.
issueTemplate: doneWhen: <worker closeout + reviewer verdict + promotion with less manual rescue than DAV-166>
startupSequence: Validate the mission cell contract with `paperclipai mission cell validate`.
Confirm the mission is about the closeout seam, not generic autonomy.
Carry one bounded mission through the same triad shape.
Harden the narrowest closeout friction revealed after worker progress.
Promote only if the next closeout path is materially less manual than before.
firstProbe: Confirm the closeout seam after post_tool_capacity is explicitly named in the packet.
Confirm reviewer truth is still first-class and path-changing.
Use normal runtime truth surfaces only, not editor internals.
